issues.title: events-maths
issues.description:
Crowdfunding.setGoal(uint256) (contract.sol#57-59) should emit an event for: 
	- fundingGoal = goal (contract.sol#58)
issues.recommendation: Review and apply security best practices

issues.title: solc-version
issues.description:
Version constraint ^0.8.20 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- VerbatimInvalidDeduplication
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess.
It is used by:
	- ^0.8.20 (contract.sol#2)

stage2_metadata.security_summary:
Contract Type: Custom
Classification Confidence: 90%
Access Control: role_based
Security Features: Standard
Implementation: Custom from scratch
Subtype: crowdfunding

Reasoning: The contract involves managing contributions towards a funding goal, which is a specific business logic not covered by standard templates like ERC20 or Governor. It requires custom logic for handling contributions, checking if the goal is reached, and managing withdrawals.

classification.reasoning: The contract involves managing contributions towards a funding goal, which is a specific business logic not covered by standard templates like ERC20 or Governor.
